items.title: What Will the Q3 Earnings Season Show?
items.description: For 2025 Q3, S&P 500 earnings are currently expected to grow +5.2% on +6.0% revenue gains. Estimates have steadily increased since the quarter began, making the overall setup favorable.

items.title: RBC Snags Advisor Overseeing $1 Billion From J.P. Morgan Wealth Management
items.description: Kevin Carey, a First Republic alum, is the latest defector from a major Wall Street firm to join the wealth arm of Canada’s largest bank.
